prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating); Recurrent hypoglycemia symptoms with irregular meals (about once weekly).

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Repaglinide 1mg three times daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 74.9 kg; Height 169.7 cm; BMI 26.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.6%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 8.7%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 206mg/dL; 9 months ago 228mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 224mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.2kg; 9 months ago 73.9kg; 6 months ago 76.3kg; 3 months ago 73.1kg; current 74.9kg), Height (12 months ago 169.7cm; 9 months ago 169.7cm; 6 months ago 169.7cm; 3 months ago 169.7cm; current 169.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 138mmHg; 6 months ago 142mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; current 74mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 78mg/g; 9 months ago 81mg/g; 6 months ago 80mg/g; 3 months ago 56mg/g; current 64mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 150mg/dL; 6 months ago 138mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 14.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
